case_title: TERESITA UMAGAT VS. NICOLAS VALLE - UMAGAT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-04-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TERESITA UMAGAT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICOLAS VALLE-UMAGAT IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR DEFENDANT TO MAKE A PAYMENT OF $733.50 (COSTS INCLUDED) TO THE PLAINTIFF'S CREDIT CARD ENDING IN 8315. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAR-04-2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,237.18 FILED BY UMAGAT, TERESITA AS TO DEFENDANT VALLE - UMAGAT, NICOLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85) SERVED DEC-26-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VALLE - UMAGAT, NICOLAS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
